title:
Average annual temperature of South Island, from 1950 to 2024
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Average annual temperature of South Island, from 1950 to 2024
I need the data that includes average annual temperature from 1950 to 2024 in South Island, so there should be a 75*2 table with the first roll shows which year and the other roll shows the average temperature of that year, if it’s possible I would like a .csv file.
I’m doing a project of analyzing the deformations of Fox Glacier, and I need the  data as a proof that temperature in South Island kept rising.

### Response from National Institute of Water and Atmospheric Research Limited
Status Data does not exist
Comments To whom it may concern,
We do not calculate annual temperature for the South Island as a standalone time series. We have mean annual temperature data across hundreds of South Island locations - and this is readily available via our data sharing platform called DataHub. You may be best to obtain data for stations nearest Fox Glacier. I suggest you start your search for the data you require at https://data.niwa.co.nz/products/climate-station-statistics?filter%3Aparameter=Temperature&geo=170.01720428466797%2C-43.47484730064833

Kind regards, Gregor

#### Likely Source Agency
National Institute of Water and Atmospheric Research Limited
1
								
									Subscriber
